rows.label: qev025112_MSG0001
rows.name:
You're from before...!
Haha! You're quite late!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0002
rows.name:
Why did you
help such a despicable bastard?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0003
rows.name:
Completely ignorant of the depth of this Ma-non's sins...
Why![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0004
rows.name:
No... Does that mean you share the same mindset
as those cowards who insult and trample on us
from their superior position as customers!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0005
rows.name: I see! Then this guy deserves the death penalty![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_JNK0010
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025112_SEL0011
rows.name: Make him retract his insult against Aqual.

rows.label: qev025112_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev025112_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask who is boarding the Doll.

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0006
rows.name:
What did you say?
Are you saying a guy like this deserves to live![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hey! Then what about my wife?
If it wasn't for this guy, she would... Damn it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0008
rows.name:
A concentrated drop of cheese and salami
straight into the stomachs of those who eat it!
Delivering Grenade Pizzas to you Ma-non![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0009
rows.name: You'd best not anger the great Powell!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0010
rows.name:
You still don't get it!?
Both Aqual and you are quite the bunch of blockheads![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0011
rows.name:
A concentrated drop of cheese and salami
straight into the stomachs of those who eat it!
Delivering Grenade Pizzas to you Ma-non![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0012
rows.name: Have you forgotten the great Powell already!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hah... Since you don't seem like you'd eat my pizza
like those bottomlessly gluttonous people,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0014
rows.name:
it's a good thing I purloined a Doll
through connections from my old haunts just in case![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_JNK0030
rows.name: Snoop

rows.label: qev025112_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask for details about Aqual.

rows.label: qev025112_JNK0040
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev025112_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask about Powell's past.

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0015
rows.name: My pizza packs quite the punch![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0016
rows.name:
Duduma, Gerome, and Aqual's girlfriend...
They all fell head over heels with just one bite![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0017
rows.name:
I called out that blockhead buried over there too,
telling him I had a clue about the culprit...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0018
rows.name: And fed him a special Grenade Pizza![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0019
rows.name:
That bastard was apparently investigating without even eating properly,
so he scarfed it down like a starving beast!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0020
rows.name:
Hahaha! It seems that blockhead
needed your cooperation a little more![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0021
rows.name:
He apparently figured out that poison was the cause,
but he didn't suspect this Grenade Pizza was the cause at all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0022
rows.name:
Hah! I fed you Ma-non a special Grenade Pizza
as a souvenir for the afterlife, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0023
rows.name:
Shall I present you with a story from the past?
Service first is Army Pizza's creed, after all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0024
rows.name:
Back on Earth, I was in the military's special forces
and handled all sorts of under-the-table jobs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0025
rows.name:
For example, making it look like a human whose consciousness was clouded
by drugs had jumped to their death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0026
rows.name:
Forcing prisoners of war to wear handcuff bombs
to make them confess... I did a lot of things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Ah, come to think of it, there was also a time I kidnapped the family
of an enemy officer and fed them to crocodiles![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0028
rows.name:
Haha! It was all very useful for my revenge
against you Ma-non... and Aqual, who is buried right there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0029
rows.name:
...You've got a look on your face
asking why I would do such a thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0030
rows.name:
It's a simple story. Revenge.
You people smashed what was precious to me to pieces.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0031
rows.name: You people... you gluttonous beasts called Ma-non,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0032
rows.name:
continuously threw complaints every single day
at my wife, who went to deliver pizzas...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0033
rows.name:
The pizza is hot and burns me?
...Pizza is supposed to be piping hot, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0034
rows.name:
The cheese is sticky and hard to eat,
do something about it...
It's 10 minutes late, make it free... Don't screw with me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0035
rows.name:
Day after day, having such unreasonable complaints thrown at her,
my wife's mind was worn down to shreds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0036
rows.name:
By that time, she was screaming just from looking at pizza.
But even so, she...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0037
rows.name:
Out of concern for me, she forced a painful smile
and continued to deliver pizzas.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_JNK0050
rows.name: Sympathize

rows.label: qev025112_SEL0051
rows.name: Say you understand his feelings.

rows.label: qev025112_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025112_SEL0061
rows.name:
Condemn him, saying that does not
justify murder.

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0038
rows.name:
Thank you. It seems you are at least
a little different from those Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0039
rows.name: But... the story doesn't end here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0040
rows.name:
You don't understand anything...
Damn it! Do you still think that after hearing this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0041
rows.name:
That day... to my wife who went to deliver pizza in the pouring rain...
Aqual delivered the final, fatal complaint!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0042
rows.name:
There are 3 slices of salami missing compared to before.
Replace it... he said.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0043
rows.name:
With that false accusation,
he destroyed her delicate heart!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0044
rows.name:
Hey! Are you saying salami
is heavier than a human life!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0045
rows.name:
Driven into a corner, my wife...
took her own life on the way back...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0046
rows.name:
You beasts cornered her...
And Aqual killed her!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0047
rows.name:
That bastard! Even after that, he had the nerve to call
and complain that "the replacement pizza hasn't arrived"![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0048
rows.name:
I will absolutely never forgive them...
And I won't forgive you for helping them, either![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0049
rows.name:
Back when I was in the military,
I was feared as the Hellfire Margherita.
You'd best savor my terrifying power to the fullest!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025112_MSG0050
rows.name:
Steam Bull! It's Army Pizza!!
I'll burn you to a crisp, inside and out![ST:wait ]
